Video.summary: Monster Jam brings the thunder to the American Heartland as the Stadium Championship Series East arrives at the Dome at America's Center in St. Louis. High-stakes rivalries take center stage as Camden Murphy fights to maintain his early-season momentum and control his own destiny following a dominant opening round. This episode highlights the 25th anniversary of the iconic El Toro Loco, with Joe Foley pushing the machine to its absolute limits in a pursuit of freestyle glory. Fans will witness the raw intensity of JCB Racing, technical brilliance in the Skills Challenge, and gravity-defying maneuvers in Freestyle, featuring a mix of legendary veterans and rising stars like Brandon Arthur.
Video.title: Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Video.title: World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Speedsters

World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Speedsters

Video.summary: We bring you the legends of Monster Jam, once again from Lebanon, NY, at the Lebanon Valley Speedway.
Video.title: Lebanon Valley Speedway - West Lebanon, NY - Day 2

Image.alt: Lebanon Valley Speedway - West Lebanon, NY - Day 2
Lebanon Valley Speedway - West Lebanon, NY - Day 2
Lebanon Valley Speedway - West Lebanon, NY - Day 2

Video.summary: Monster Jam Prime Time storms into the Dome at America's Center in St. Louis for an electrifying Round 3 of the Stadium Championship Series East. Witness the high-stakes intensity of the "Good Vibes Tour" as rising star Brandon Arthur attempts to fill the massive shoes of Tristan England in JCB Digatron, challenging established titans for the overall event championship. The competition reaches a fever pitch across three grueling segments—JCB Racing, the technical Skills Challenge, and gravity-defying Freestyle—where every point is crucial for the season standings. From backflip attempts that push the 12,000-pound machines to their breaking point to the methodical precision required on the St. Louis dirt, this episode captures the raw power and rivalries of the world's most elite monster truck tour.
Video.title: Dome at America's Center, St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: Dome at America's Center, St. Louis, MO
Dome at America's Center, St. Louis, MO
Dome at America's Center, St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Primetime visits Anaheim, CA for more racing, skills, and freestyle fun.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Catch all the Monster Jam action in round 12 at Bon Secours Wellness Arena in Greenville SC.
Video.title: Bon Secours Wellness Arena - Greenville, SC

Bon Secours Wellness Arena - Greenville, SC
Bon Secours Wellness Arena - Greenville, SC

Video.summary: Ruh-roh! This Monster Jam truck is NOT messing around! Solve the mystery of Scooby-Doo's best freestyles in this EPIC highlight compilation featuring All-Star drivers including Brianna Mahon, Nicole Johnson, Linsey Read, and more!
Video.title: Scooby Doo Highlight Compilation

Video.summary: Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson continues to lead the east series as the action heats up at the PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh. Monster Jam’s reigning Rookie of the Year will be challenged through four competitions by Bernard Lyght in Megalodon and Linsey Read piloting Scooby-Doo as they battle for the Overall Event Championship.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

Video.summary: Atlanta Motor Speedway hosts Monster Jam for a night of racing, skills, and freestyle action.
Video.title: Atlanta Motor Speedway - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Don't miss the Monster Jam kickoff to the Path of Destruction tour at M&T Bank Stadium in Baltimore, MD.
Video.title: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series East roars into our nation’s capital with four adrenaline-filled competitions. Grave Digger’s Krysten Anderson looks to keep the series points lead while El Toro Loco’s Armando Castro and Dragon’s Coty Saucier challenge her for the overall event championship.
Video.title: Capital One Bank Arena - Washington DC

Image.alt: Capital One Bank Arena - Washington DC
Capital One Bank Arena - Washington DC
Capital One Bank Arena - Washington DC
